name: Snickerdoodles,chocolate
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Lightly grease cookie sheets.
Beat Margarine and sugars until light and fluffy. Add Eggs, beating until well combined.
In a separate bowl, combine Flour, Baking Soda, Cocoa Powder, and Cinnamon with Rolled Oats.
Mix the remaining Sugar, Cinnamon, and 2 tablespoons together.
Chill dough in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour until firm.
Roll into balls and roll each ball in the sugar, cinnamon, and cocoa mixture.
Place cookies about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden. Do not over bake.
Cool on wire racks before serving.
